Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Dr. Frank Hsu
Off Calendar Dec-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rober Smith, 415-294-1465 for Plaintiff/Moving party Calixto Robles.
Brandon Fields, 831-818-2041 for Defendant/Opposing party Walter Moreno individually and as Trustee of the Walter Moreno 2000 Trust.

Argued by counsel for both sides. Mr. Fields objects to the tentative ruling and states that there was a clerical error by his office regarding the late filing of the opposition. Mr. Fields futher states that the Planitiff served two copies of the moving papers with different hearing dates. Mr. Smith objects to the admission of both declarations submitted by the defendant and request that both declarations be stricken. The Court considers both declarations. Mr. Smith does not object to the matter being heard today. After futher agruements the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CALIXTO ROBLES' Motion To Disqualify Dr. Frank Hsu is GRANTED. See Shadow Traffic v. Sup. Ct. (1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 1067 and Western Digital Corp. v. Sup. Ct. (1998) 60 Cal.App.4th 1471. The Court notes that Defendant's opposition is 5 court days late and Ex. D to Fields Declaration is not what it is claimed to be by Mr. Fields in paragraph 11 of his declaration. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
